title: EMERGENCY NOTICE - Monogon Security
body:
Assume all databoard communications are being monitored.

We knew bringing the whole office to the LAB-SPA was only temporary.

MonoSec has caught on and will start digging into our work.

We have to find a way to get the incomplete systems out for continued development, they can’t be allowed to confiscate it.
Smash and flush EVERYTHING immediately.

- No more public comms. Execute Plan A-3
